reviews.comment:
Siempre cargo en ACA del cual soy socio hace bastante el expendedor del surtidor de nafta no me comunica que la promoción banco patagonia había terminado lo que genera un mal entendido no voy hacer acusaciones cómo fui entrada ya la noche puede ser que el expendedor estuviera cansado de todas maneras están para atender cordialmente al socio de ACA

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up at ACA, of which I have been a member for quite some time. The gas station attendant doesn't inform me that the Banco Patagonia promotion had ended, which creates a misunderstanding. I'm not going to make accusations, as I was late at night, it could be that the attendant was tired. In any case, they are there to cordially serve ACA members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoMmNyeE53EAE

reviews.comment:
bien, el ACA es un lugar necesario en la experiencia de viaje, consistente y bien gestionado, y el de Mar del Plata está, como es usual, muy bien ubicado

(Translated by Google)
Well, the ACA is a necessary part of the travel experience, consistent and well-managed, and the one in Mar del Plata is, as usual, very well located.
